name: Kenny Rogers' Country Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except almonds in a large bowl.
2. Mix lightly until well combined.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. When ready to serve, garnish with toasted almonds if desired.
5. Serve chilled. Makes 4 servings.
